member.name: T:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteFinder
member.summary: Provides a interface to modify and find PLC network cassettes also known as COM5

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation
member.summary: Information about the COM cassette

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.IsConfigurating
member.summary: Indicates if the cassette is currently configurating

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.Name
member.summary: Name of the COM cassette

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.UsesDHCP
member.summary: Indicates the usage of DHCP

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.IPAddress
member.summary: IP Address of the COM cassette

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.SubnetMask
member.summary: Subnet mask of the cassette

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.GatewayAddress
member.summary: Default gateway of the cassette

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.MacAddress
member.summary: Mac address of the cassette

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.MacAddressStr
member.summary: Mac address of the cassette formatted as a MAC string (XX:XX:XX:XX:XX)

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.Endpoint
member.summary: The source endpoint the cassette is reachable from

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.EndpointName
member.summary: The name of the endpoint the device is reachable from, or null if not specifically defined

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.FirmwareVersion
member.summary: Firmware version as string

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.Port
member.summary: The tcp port of the cassette

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteInformation.Status
member.summary: Status of the cassette

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteStatus
member.summary: Needs a list of all status codes.. hard to reverse engineer

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteStatus.Normal
member.summary: Cassette is running as intended

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.ComCassette.CassetteStatus.DHCPError
member.summary: Cassette DHCP resolution error

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.DateAndTime
member.summary:
A DateAndTime struct of 4 bytes represented as seconds from 2001-01-01 in the PLC
This also works for the PLC type TIME_OF_DAY and DATE

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.DWord
member.summary: A DWord is a 16 bit value of 2 bytes

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.DWord.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets the bit value at the given position

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.Word
member.summary: A word is a 16 bit value of 2 bytes

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.Word.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the bit value at the given position

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers
member.summary: Contains helper methods

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.SearchBytePattern(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Searches a byte array for a pattern
member.returns: The start index of the found pattern or -1

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.BytesFromHexASCIIString(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string (after converting to upper case) to ascii bytes

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.ParseRCSingleBit(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a return message as RCS single bit

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.ParseRCMultiBit(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a return message as RCS multiple bits

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.ParseResponseStringAsBytes(System.String)
member.summary:
Parses a return string from the PLC as a raw byte array
Example:
↓Start ↓end %01$RD0100020010\r
This will return the byte array:
[0x01, 0x00, 0x02, 0x00]

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.SplitInParts(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Splits a string into even parts

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.SplitByAlternatingCase(System.String)
member.summary: Splits a string by uppercase words

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.JoinSplitByUpperCase(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Splits a string by uppercase words and joins them with the given seperator

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.HexStringToByteArray(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a hex string (AB01C1) to a byte array

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.ToHexString(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Converts a byte array to a hexadecimal string

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.BigToMixedEndian(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Switches byte order from mixed to big endian

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.IsBoolean(MewtocolNet.RegisterPrefix)
member.summary: Checks if the register type is boolean

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.IsNumericDTDDT(MewtocolNet.RegisterPrefix)
member.summary: Checks if the register type numeric

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.IsPhysicalInOutType(MewtocolNet.RegisterPrefix)
member.summary: Checks if the register type is an physical in or output of the plc

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.GetSynonims(MewtocolNet.PlcType)
member.summary: Gets synonim names for a plc type enum
member.returns: All or just one of there are no synonims for the same

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.ToName(MewtocolNet.PlcType)
member.summary: Converts the enum to a plc name string

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.ToNameDecompose(MewtocolNet.PlcType)
member.summary: Converts the enum to a decomposed struct

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.IsDiscontinued(MewtocolNet.PlcType)
member.summary: Checks if the PLC type is discontinued

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolHelpers.Map``2(``0,``1)
member.summary: Maps the source object to target object.

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.ParsedPlcName
member.summary: A structure containing the PLC name parsed

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ParsedPlcName.WholeName
member.summary: Whole name of the PLC

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ParsedPlcName.Group
member.summary: The family group of the PLC

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ParsedPlcName.Size
member.summary: The Memory size of the PLC

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ParsedPlcName.SubTypes
member.summary: The subtype strings of the plc

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ParsedPlcName.TypeCode
member.summary: Typecode of the parsed string

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ParsedPlcName.EncodedName
member.summary: The encoded name, same as enum name

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.ParsedPlcName.IsDiscontinuedModel
member.summary: True if the model is discontinued

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.PlcFormat.ToPlcTime(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary:
Gets the TimeSpan as a PLC representation string fe.
T#1h10m30s20ms

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.PlcFormat.ToBitString(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Turns a bit array into a 0 and 1 string

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.IPlc
member.summary: Provides a interface for Panasonic PLCs

member.name: E:MewtocolNet.IPlc.Connected
member.summary: Fires when the interface is fully connected to a PLC

member.name: E:MewtocolNet.IPlc.Reconnected
member.summary: Fires when a reconnect attempt was successfull

member.name: E:MewtocolNet.IPlc.ReconnectTryStarted
member.summary: Fires when the interfaces makes a reconnect try to the PLC

member.name: E:MewtocolNet.IPlc.Disconnected
member.summary: Fires when the plc/interface connection was fully closed

member.name: E:MewtocolNet.IPlc.RegisterChanged
member.summary: Fires when the value of a register changes

member.name: E:MewtocolNet.IPlc.ModeChanged
member.summary: Plc mode was changed

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.IsConnected
member.summary: The current connection state of the interface

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.IsSending
member.summary: This device is sending a message to the plc

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.BytesPerSecondUpstream
member.summary: The current transmission speed in bytes per second

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.IsReceiving
member.summary: This device is receiving a message from the plc

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.BytesPerSecondDownstream
member.summary: The current transmission speed in bytes per second

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.PollerCycleDurationMs
member.summary: Current poller cycle duration

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.IsRunMode
member.summary: Shorthand indicator if the plc is in RUN mode

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.QueuedMessages
member.summary: Currently queued message count

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.PlcInfo
member.summary: Generic information about the connected PLC

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.StationNumber
member.summary: The station number of the PLC

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.ConnectionInfo
member.summary: A connection info string

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.ConnectTimeout
member.summary: The initial connection timeout in milliseconds

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.ConnectAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Tries to establish a connection with the device asynchronously
member.param: A callback for excecuting something inside the plc connetion process

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.DisconnectAsync
member.summary: Disconnects the device from its current plc connection and awaits the end of all asociated tasks

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.Disconnect
member.summary: Disconnects the device from its current plc connection

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.StopReconnecting
member.summary: Stops a running reconnect task

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.WithReconnectTask(System.Func{System.Int32,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Adds a task to each reconnect cycle that is run before each individual try

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.SetOperationModeAsync(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Changes the PLCs operation mode to the given one
member.param: True for RUN mode, false for PROG mode
member.returns: The success state of the write operation

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.ToggleOperationModeAsync
member.summary: Toggles between RUN and PROG mode
member.returns: The success state of the write operation

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.RestartProgramAsync
member.summary: Restarts the plc program
member.returns: The success state of the write operation

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.ReadProgramAsync
member.summary: Reads the program from the connected plc

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.FactoryResetAsync
member.summary: Factory resets the PLC, this includes the current program and data in the EEPROM

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.AwaitFirstDataCycleAsync
member.summary: Use this to await the first poll iteration after connecting, This also completes if the initial connection fails

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.UpdateAsync
member.summary: Runs a single poller cycle manually, useful if you want to use a custom update frequency
member.returns: The number of inidvidual mewtocol commands sent

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.GetConnectionInfo
member.summary: Gets the connection info string

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.GetRegister(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a register from the plc by name

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.GetAllRegisters
member.summary: Gets all registers from the plc

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.BuildRegisters(System.Action{MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.BuilderPatterns.RBuildMulti})
member.summary: Builds and adds registers to the device

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.ClearAllRegisters
member.summary: Clears all registers atached to the interface

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlc.Explain
member.summary: Explains the register internal layout at this moment in time

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlc.MemoryAreas
member.summary: A readonly list of the underlying memory areas

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.IPlcEthernet
member.summary: Provides a interface for Panasonic PLCs over a ethernet connection

member.summary: The current IP of the PLC connection

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlcEthernet.Port
member.summary: The current port of the PLC connection

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.IPlcEthernet.HostEndpoint
member.summary: The host ip endpoint, leave it null to use an automatic interface

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.IPlcEthernet.ConfigureConnection(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Configures the serial interface

member.summary: Port name of the serial port that this device is configured for

member.summary: The serial connection baud rate that this device is configured for

member.summary: The serial connection data bits

member.summary: The serial connection parity

member.summary: The serial connection stop bits

member.summary: Is RTS (Request to send) enabled?

member.summary: Sets up the connection settings for the device
member.param: The station number of the PLC

member.summary: Tries to establish a connection with the device asynchronously

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.Logging.Logger
member.summary: Logging module for all PLCs

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.Logging.Logger.LogLevel
member.summary: Sets the loglevel for the global logging module

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.Logging.Logger.DefaultTargets
member.summary: Defines the default output logger targets

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Logging.Logger.OnNewLogMessage(System.Action{System.DateTime,MewtocolNet.Logging.LogLevel,System.String},System.Nullable{MewtocolNet.Logging.LogLevel})
member.summary: Gets invoked whenever a new log message is ready

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.Logging.LogLevel
member.summary: The loglevel of the logging module

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.Logging.LogLevel.None
member.summary: Logs nothing

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.Logging.LogLevel.Error
member.summary: Logs only errors

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.Logging.LogLevel.Info
member.summary: Logs info like connection establish and loss

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.Logging.LogLevel.Change
member.summary: Logs only state changes

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.Logging.LogLevel.Verbose
member.summary: Logs all errors, state changes, and messages

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.Logging.LogLevel.Critical
member.summary: Logs all types including network traffic

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol
member.summary: Builder helper for mewtocol interfaces

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol.GetSerialPortNames
member.summary: Lists all usable COM port names

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol.GetUseableBaudRates
member.summary: Lists all usable serial baud rates

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol.GetSourceEndpoints
member.summary: Lists all useable source endpoints of the device this is running on for usage with PLCs

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol.GetUseableNetInterfaces
member.summary: Lists all useable network interfaces of the device this is running on for usage with PLCs

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol.Ethernet(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds a ethernet based Mewtocol Interface
member.param: Plc station number 0xEE for direct communication

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol.Ethernet(System.Net.IPAddress,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds a ethernet based Mewtocol Interface
member.param: Plc station number 0xEE for direct communication

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol.Serial(System.String,MewtocolNet.BaudRate,MewtocolNet.DataBits,System.IO.Ports.Parity,System.IO.Ports.StopBits,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds a serial port based Mewtocol Interface
member.param: Baud rate of the plc toolport
Parity rate of the plc toolport
Stop bits of the plc toolport
Plc station number 0xEE for direct communication

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol.SerialAuto(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds a serial mewtocol interface that finds the correct settings for the given port name automatically
member.param: Plc station number 0xEE for direct communication

member.summary: Sets the poll level for the given key

member.summary: Sets the source of the outgoing ethernet connection

member.summary: Sets the source of the outgoing ethernet connection
member.param: IP address of the source interface (Format: 127.0.0.1)

member.summary: Attaches a auto poller to the interface that reads all registers cyclic

member.summary: General setting for the memory manager

member.summary: Adds a task to each heartbeat cycle that is run before each individual cycle request

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol.PostInit`1.WithHeartbeatTask(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Repeats the passed method each time the hearbeat is triggered, use

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Mewtocol.PostInit`1.DisableHeartBeat
member.summary: Disables all heartbeat tasks

member.summary: Builds and returns the final plc interface

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.MewtocolInterface
member.summary: The PLC com interface class

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.MewtocolInterface.PollerActive
member.summary: True if the poller is actvice (can be paused)

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolInterface.KillPoller
member.summary: Kills the poller completely

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolInterface.AttachPoller
member.summary: Attaches a continous reader that reads back the Registers and Contacts

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolInterface.UpdateAsync
member.summary: Runs a single poller cycle manually, useful if you want to use a custom update frequency
member.returns: The number of inidvidual mewtocol commands sent

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolInterface.WithRegisterCollections(System.Collections.Generic.List{MewtocolNet.RegisterAttributes.RegisterCollection})
member.summary: Adds the given register collection and all its registers with attributes to the register list

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolInterface.GetInfoAsync(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets generic information about the PLC

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolInterface.GetMetadataAsync
member.summary: Gets the metadata information for the PLC program
member.returns: The metadata or null of it isn't used by the PLC program

members.member:
Writes a byte array to a span over multiple registers at once, Rembember the plc can only store word so in order to write to a word array your byte array should be double the size
/// start address of the array

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.MewtocolInterface.ReadAreaByteRangeAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,MewtocolNet.RegisterPrefix,System.Action{System.Double})
member.summary: Reads the bytes from the start adress for counts byte length, doesn't block the receive thread
member.param: Gets invoked when the progress changes, contains the progress as a double from 0 - 1.0
member.returns: A byte array of the requested DT area

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.MewtocolInterfaceTcp
member.summary: The PLC com interface class

member.summary: Gets the connection info string

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo
member.summary: Holds various informations about the PLC

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.TypeCode
member.summary: The type of the PLC named by Panasonic

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.TypeName
member.summary: The full qualified name of the PLC

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.ProgramCapacity
member.summary: Program capacity in 1K steps

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.CpuVersion
member.summary: Version of the cpu

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.OperationMode
member.summary: Contains information about the PLCs operation modes as flags

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.OperationModeTags
member.summary: A list of operation mode tags, derived from the OPMode flags

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.HardwareInformation
member.summary: Hardware information flags about the PLC

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.HardwareInformationTags
member.summary: A list of hardware info tags, derived from the HardwareInformation flags

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.SelfDiagnosticError
member.summary: Current error code of the PLC

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.IsRunMode
member.summary: Quickcheck for the runmode flag

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.Metadata
member.summary: Contains useful information about the PLC program and metadata

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PLCInfo.None
member.summary: Plc info when its not connected

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.PlcMetadata
member.summary: Contains useful information about the PLC program and metadata

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PlcMetadata.LastUserLibChangeDate
member.summary: The last date the used user librarys were changed

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PlcMetadata.LastPouChangeDate
member.summary: The last date the program Pou's were changed

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PlcMetadata.LastConfigChangeDate
member.summary: The last date the PLC configuration was changed

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PlcMetadata.FPWinVersion
member.summary: The used FP-Win version to create the PLC program

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PlcMetadata.ProjectVersion
member.summary: The custom project version of the PLC program

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PlcMetadata.MetaDataVersion
member.summary: Metadata format version

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PlcMetadata.ProjectID
member.summary: The project ID of the PLC program

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PlcMetadata.ApplicationID
member.summary: The application / machine specific ID for the PLC program

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.PlcMetadata.CompanyID
member.summary: The company ID of the PLC program creator

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.BitCount
member.summary: The size of the bitwise register

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.BitCount.B16
member.summary: 16 bit

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.BitCount.B32
member.summary: 32 bit

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.ConnectResult
member.summary: The result of an initial connection

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.ConnectResult.Unknown
member.summary: There is no known reason for the connection to fail

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.ConnectResult.Connected
member.summary: The PLC did establish the connection as expected

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.ConnectResult.Timeout
member.summary: The tcp/serial connection to the device timed out (PLC did not respond within time limits)

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.ConnectResult.MewtocolError
member.summary: The PLC sent a an error message on the type determination stage

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.ConnectResult.MismatchMetadata
member.summary: The metadata of the PLC did not match the required metadata for the interface

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.HWInformation
member.summary: Contains hardware information about the device as flags

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.HWInformation.UserROM
member.summary: Has user ROM

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.HWInformation.ICCard
member.summary: Has IC card

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.HWInformation.GeneralPurposeMemory
member.summary: Has general purpose memory

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.HWInformation.UltraHighSpeed
member.summary: Is CPU ultra high speed type

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.MewtocolVersion.Unknown
member.summary: Unable to specify the version

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.MewtocolVersion.Mewtocol
member.summary: Uses the standard mewtocol lib

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.MewtocolVersion.Mewtocol7
member.summary: Uses the extended mewtocol7 lib

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.OPMode
member.summary: Descibes the operation mode of the device as flags

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.OPMode.None
member.summary: No operation mode flag active

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.OPMode.RunMode
member.summary: Is in RUN mode, otherwise its PROG Mode

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.OPMode.TestMode
member.summary: Is in test mode, otherwise ok

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.OPMode.BreakPointPerOneStep
member.summary: Is BRK/1 step executed

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.OPMode.BreakEnabled
member.summary: Is BRK command enabled

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.OPMode.ExternalOutput
member.summary: Is outputting to external device

member.summary: A register collection base with full auto read and notification support built in

member.summary: Reference to its bound interface

member.summary: Whenever one of its props changes

member.summary: Triggers a property changed event
member.param: Name of the property to trigger for

member.summary: Use this on the setter method of a property to enable automatic property register writing

member.summary: Gets called when the register collection base was linked to its parent mewtocol interface

member.summary: Gets called when the register collection base was linked to its parent mewtocol interface and the plc connection is established

member.summary: The parse try failed at the intial regex match

member.summary: The parse try failed at the afer- regex match

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.ParseResultState.Success
member.summary: The parse try did work

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.StepBaseTyper.AsType``1(MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.StepBase)
member.summary: Sets the register as a dotnet type for direct conversion

item.description: 16 or 32 bit enums, also supports flags
String of chars, the interface will automatically get the length

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.StepBaseTyper.AsType(MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.StepBase,System.Type)
member.summary:
Sets the register as a dotnet type for direct conversion
Boolean R/X/Y registers
16 bit signed integer
16 bit un-signed integer
16 bit word (2 bytes)
32 bit signed integer
32 bit un-signed integer
32 bit word (4 bytes)
32 bit floating point
32 bit time from interpreted as
16 or 32 bit enums, also supports flags
String of chars, the interface will automatically get the length

item.description: 16 or 32 bit enums, also supports flags
String of chars, the interface will automatically get the length

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.StepBaseTyper.AsType(MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.StepBase,MewtocolNet.PlcVarType)
member.summary: Sets the register type as a predefined

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.StepBaseTyper.AsType(MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.StepBase,System.String)
member.summary:
Sets the register type from the plc type string
Supported types:
BOOLBoolean R/X/Y registers
INT16 bit signed integer
UINT16 bit un-signed integer
DINT32 bit signed integer
UDINT32 bit un-signed integer
REAL32 bit floating point
TIME32 bit time interpreted as
STRINGString of chars, the interface will automatically get the length
STRING[N]String of chars, pre capped to N
WORD16 bit word interpreted as
DWORD32 bit double word interpreted as

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.StepBaseTyper.AsTypeArray``1(MewtocolNet.RegisterBuilding.StepBase,System.Int32[])
member.summary: Sets the register as a (multidimensional) array targeting a PLC array

item.description: 16 or 32 bit enums, also supports flags
String of chars, the interface will automatically get the length

member.param: Indicies for multi dimensional arrays, for normal arrays just one INT
member.example:
One dimensional arrays:
ARRAY [0..2] OF INT = AsTypeArray<short[]>(3)
ARRAY [5..6] OF DWORD = AsTypeArray<DWord[]>(2)
Multi dimensional arrays:
ARRAY [0..2, 0..3, 0..4] OF INT = AsTypeArray<short[,,]>(3,4,5)
ARRAY [5..6, 0..2] OF DWORD = AsTypeArray<DWord[,]>(2, 3)

member.name: T:MewtocolNet.Registers.IRegister
member.summary: An interface for all register types

member.summary: Gets called whenever the value was changed

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.Registers.IRegister.IsAutoGenerated
member.summary:
Defines if the register was auto generated from a property.
If so it is not allowed to remove the register from the interface stack

member.summary: The readonly memory area of the register

member.summary: Reads the register value async from the plc

member.name: M:MewtocolNet.Registers.IStringRegister.WriteAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Writes the register content async to the plc

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.SetupClasses.InterfaceSettings.MaxOptimizationDistance
member.summary:
This feature can improve read write times by a big margin but also block outgoing messages inbetween polling cycles more frequently
The max distance of the gap between registers (if there is a gap between adjacent registers) to merge them into one request
Example:
We have a register at DT100 (1 word long) and a register at DT101 (1 word long)
- If the max distance is 0 it will not merge them into one request
- If the max distance is 1 it will merge them into one request
- If the max distance is 2 and the next register is at DT102 it will also merge them and ignore the spacer byte in the response

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.SetupClasses.InterfaceSettings.PollLevelOverwriteMode
member.summary:
The overwrite mode for poll levels
When set to the lowest average poll level for overlapping registers gets used
When set to the highest average poll level for overlapping registers gets used

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.SetupClasses.InterfaceSettings.MaxDataBlocksPerWrite
member.summary:
Defines how many WORD blocks the interface will send on a DT area write request before splitting up messages
Higher numbers will result in a longer send and receive thread blocking time

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.SetupClasses.InterfaceSettings.SendReceiveTimeoutMs
member.summary: The send and receive timout for messages in milliseconds

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.SetupClasses.InterfaceSettings.HeartbeatIntervalMs
member.summary: The heartbeat interval in milliseconds, it is recommended to use 3000ms

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.SetupClasses.InterfaceSettings.TryReconnectAttempts
member.summary: Number of attempts to try and reconnect to the plc, 0 for none

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.SetupClasses.InterfaceSettings.TryReconnectDelayMs
member.summary: The delay between reconnect trys

member.name: P:MewtocolNet.SetupClasses.InterfaceSettings.AlwaysGetMetadata
member.summary: Sets wether or not the interface should always retrieve metadata on connection start

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.TypeConversion.Conversions.items
member.summary: All conversions for reading data from and to the plc, excluding Enum types

member.name: F:MewtocolNet.UnderlyingRegisters.AreaBase.managedRegisters
member.summary: List of register link groups that are managed in this memory area
